item.title: Those trains coulda been much safer
item.description: They had some GOP help to remove regulations. https://www.levernews.com/rail-companies-blocked-safety-rules-before-ohio-derailment/ (originally posted by @WalkGood on 2023-02-16 01:04:50)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Wedding Catwoman Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— still obsessed with these pictures and wanted to share some more detail of the dress.
This was some of Joelle Jones’ original art of Selina Kyle in her wedding dress.
One of my favorite variant covers— this is from Batman 50.
Aaaand this is an edit by my friend BriLanImagery. I sent him both photos and he made the composite— really great work IMO. I actually gave a print of this to Tom King (who wrote that Batman run) and he loved it, still a highlight for me!
Another pic of the top portion of the dress (and me).
And here’s the detail of the back of the dress! It was made by Molly Nguyen designs. I can’t sew to save my life but I really wanted to do this cosplay so I’m really grateful to her for doing such a wonderful job with it.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
probably
makes sense to me
no doubt in my mind
memes are the best, and making meme dumps is really fun
mmm hmm
i miss these days of SNL
not sure why this is in here but it's staying
worst feeling
sometimes this might be true, emphasis on might
dang
good times
on one right now
you never know, it could be my parents' first time seeing nudity
obviously
this will make more sense in you watch Hereditary
as is tradition
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Meanwhile in Canada
item.description: Loblaw$ CEO Galen Weston (piece of shit) simultaneously claims supply chain issues are to blame for increased grocery prices, while crowing to shareholders about unprecedented record profits for the company. Eff that guy and the billion dollar horse he rode in on.
item.dc:creator: beergeek

item.title: Weight issues, yep! And I know this is old, but it's still true! The fact that this was 'heavy' and in some people's eyes still is, is ridiculous!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Absolutely perfect!
item.description: I can confirm that last part works, at least with my kids it does. When my daughter was 16 we had moved so in her new school she made new friends. I agreed she could go and have a sleepover in a friends house... About midnight I got a phone call, they had been drinking and it was her first time being drunk, she hated it and thought she 'was dying' (I think most of us have been there lol) she just wanted me to come and get her... When I got there all her friends thought she'd be in trouble, they were shocked when I said absolutely not because she rang me, I explained she'd have been in big trouble if I found out the next day and she hadn't told me, that then the trust would be broken. It worked, the hangover was punishment enough any way because still now, 6 yrs later she hates getting drunk and doesn't let herself get that far! So talk to your kids, let them know that they can trust you and that trust goes both ways, always make sure they know they can reach out when they're in a bad situation, whatever that may be!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Valentines day
item.description: Yup, while Ive had plenty of tinder dates I've always had the lingering regret that I never really dared to ask out the girls I truly fancied in highschool. Luckily for me I met someone who I really liked, could'nt sleep for several days debating if I should ask her out... Guess I have no more regrets! Got a few beers to keep me company, and on to another year of being single! If theres any other lost souls in usersub, send me some memes!
item.dc:creator: Beathoven70

item.title: You got that on camera right (O.O)

Rugged Men :)
Happy Valentine's Day!!
Front page!! ????? Yaay!!!! Biiiig thanks!!!
Excited to share my 26 cute animal Valentine-themed coloring book on SiteSouk.com for FREE! ????? Check it out! #ColoringBook #ValentinesDay
Edit: Thank you so much for FP!!!! Anyone interested in my drawings?? I'm excited to share 26 CUTE Valentine's Day-themed coloring pages, now available for FREE on my website!
item.dc:creator: SiteSouk

item.title: Meme Dump -mix- V-DAY SPECIAL
item.description:
♡ This - this is me. **WE** eat lol
♡
♡
♡
♡ its true
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡ but what if it was pineapple on pizza? Imgur is either gonna hate me or like me - but I love Hawaiian Pizza ♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡ I also love tomatoes on my burgers and just tomatoes in general
♡
♡
♡ I... could never....
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡
♡ Happy Valentines Day ~ remember today means nothing & you can create your own traditions anytime you want. If today has always been hard for you, create a new transition for yourself. Make yourself Spaghetti, shape it into a heart, watch a zombie movie and devour your Spaghetti like it's brains or a heart or something lol - okay byyyyyyyeeeeee ♡
